log_extract_fail: Failed to extract text from XML file.
log_mass_trans_start: Starting batch translation in the background...
export_fail: Error while saving the translated XML file.
api_gemini_key: Please, insert your API Gemini Key
warn_no_xml_message: Please load an XML file first.
api_key_prompt: Please enter your API key for {provider}:
warn_load_xml_for_table: Load an XML file first to populate the table.
confirm_update_message:
This will reload the texts from the XML file and discard all unsaved translations in the table.

Do you wish to continue?
validation_success_message: SUCCESS! The structure of the exported file is identical to the original.
validation_fail_message:
WARNING! The structure of the exported file is DIFFERENT from the original.

Check the log in the main window for more details.
api_key_link_gemini: Get free key at Google AI Studio ↗
ollama_no_key: No key needed — install Ollama locally ↗
ollama_thinking_tooltip:
Enables internal reasoning before translating.
Improves quality for complex texts.
Slower — not recommended for large batches.
Requires a compatible model (Gemma3, Qwen3, etc.).
log_checkpoint_cleared: {count} items marked as pending. Ready for a new translation pass.
log_select_tags_first: Select the Parent Tag and Target Tag before loading.
log_presets_import_fail: Import failed: invalid or incompatible file.
xml_picker_subtitle: {count} file(s) found. Select which one to load:
info_tip_load_xml: Click 'Load XML' and select your file. The app auto-detects tags. Choose the Parent Tag (repeating element) and Target Tag (field with text), then click 'Reload' to populate the table.
info_tip_tags: Parent Tag: the repeating element in the XML (e.g. hero, baseVillain). Target Tag: the child field containing text to translate (e.g. bio, dispName). Use the dropdowns to browse auto-detected options.
info_tip_presets: Save tag combinations with a description for quick reuse. Handy when a file has multiple text types (hero bios, villain bios, etc.). Presets are stored in tag_presets.json.
info_tip_batch: Click 'Translate All' to translate all pending entries. Gemini processes 120 items per batch with automatic pauses. Cancel at any time — progress is saved in the checkpoint file.
info_tip_single: Select a row in the table to view the original text. Click 'Translate Selected' to translate just that entry. Edit the translation manually and click 'Confirm Translation' to save it.
info_tip_save: 'Export Translated XML' creates a new file without touching the original. 'Save to Current File' overwrites the original and reloads it automatically — the translated text becomes the new original for further review.
info_tip_context: Optional field in the right panel. Enter the game or universe (e.g. Marvel, Skyrim, The Sims 4) so the AI uses appropriate terminology and tone. Applies to both single and batch translations.
info_tip_glossary: Click 'Manage Glossary' in the right panel to define fixed word pairs (e.g. 'Hero' → 'Hero'). The glossary is injected into the AI prompt to ensure consistent terminology throughout the game.
preset_game_folder_tooltip: Root folder where the game is installed. Preset XML files are located from here.
preset_file_invalid: File not found in game folder
translation_context_tooltip:
Ex: "Marvel Comics, superhero game"
"Skyrim, medieval fantasy RPG"

Keep it short and in English for best results.
Use the Glossary to lock specific terms.
